feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: A few days ago, I said to a Pole that 50% of my bookshelf is made up of Russian …
entry.content: A few days ago, I said to a Pole that 50% of my bookshelf is made up of Russian books, and I only have one Polish book (one of Sapkowskis, of course). This is a thread where people bordering Russia or under ex-Soviet influence can post some of their good literature that was translated to English, because I assume people who hate Russia so much on the claims that they are uncivilised have greater books or music than them and maybe, who knows, my bookshelf will be filled with a metric ton of Polis

Non-happenings, habbenings, haqqenings, small GETs, complaints about shit boards being shit, known spergs sperging out, personal report buttons and blogposting / avatarfagging et al. belong in the /nah/ thread at >>>/bant/nah Premium happenings, goldppenings, diamondppenings, rare GETs, great posts from great boards, users loved by everyone, secret meetups with mods and exclusive entries in blog.4chan.org belong in the

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 1 - So GLM 5.2 is 700b parameters (ish) 2 - 4x DGX Sparks can supposedly handle …
entry.content: 1 - So GLM 5.2 is 700b parameters (ish) 2 - 4x DGX Sparks can supposedly handle up to 700b parameters (give or take) 3 - GLM 5.2 is supposedly in striking distance of the performance of GPT 5.5 and Opus 4.8. In my brief tests, it's really not shabby at all. 4 - So for $20k, you can get near the frontier on your table. 5 - Extrapolate the trend, and you could have mythos/5.5 pro - class models in your dining room for the cost of a cheap car less than five years from now. Even without extrapolatio

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I guess I solved the LCD panel dilemma
entry.content: People are divided between OLED and LCD/MINILED etc. (Microled is still way too expensive) One of the main disadvantages of MINILEDs is that there isn't enough resolution of the backlight. The best minileds have around 15000 minileds, which translates into around 163 x 92 pixels. Which are the sony true rgb TVs. But what if someone combined IPS with OLED??? IPS as the front panel and OLED as backlight? All manufacturers have to do is create an OLED panel with DVD like resolution (720×405 pixels)

entry.title: /mu/ Music: 2016 was a great year for music
entry.content: to celebrate 10 years since 2016, post your favourite albums from that year. I'll start: 1. Young Thug - JEFFERY 2. Touché Amoré - Stage Four 3. Lil Peep - Hellboy 4. Lil Peep - Crybaby 5. DIIV - Is the Is Are 6. Young Thug - Slime Season 3 7. Jesu & Sun Kil Moon - Jesu / Sun Kil Moon 8. Bladee - Eversince 9. Wicca Phase Springs Eternal - Secret Boy 10. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. entry.content: https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/five -men-arrested-and-charged-plot-atta ck-and-kill-government-officials-an d-others-attending The Justice Department announced today charges against five men for an alleged plot to carry out an attack to kill government officials and others attending the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) Freedom 250 event held at the White House last Sunday. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Indrajeet (1991)
entry.content: In order to continue suppressing the workers in his company; multi-millionaire, Din Dayal gets a union leader and his wife murdered. When inspector Indrajeet attempts to arrest Dayal his daughter, Shanti intervenes. This angers Indrajeet whose beloved is also Shanti and he decides to cut all connections from her. Indrajeet adopts the daughter, Neelu of the diseased union leader and years later after his retirement from police service attempts to bring her up. Indrajeet gets Neelu marry to Vijay

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I've realized that there's a better way for humans. If I'm to condense the main …
entry.content: I've realized that there's a better way for humans. If I'm to condense the main point of these ideas into a few words it may be "together we're better". If they think about it, I'm sure anyone would admit and agree that it's by working together we have achieved what we have, going to the moon, curing diseases, or just having easy access to food. No man could achieve alone what we can together. That is the core strength of humanity. We developed language to communicate so we can work together. Bu

entry.title: /o/ Auto: GM Van body swap
entry.content: >be a GMT610 >be body on frame >frame How many have tried swapping out the van body for truck body or even a car body. Pic related: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i9z zNoVN0bo

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Toyotas are not as good as this broad hypes
entry.content: I bought a 22 Camry 1.5 years ago and its just dogshit. I know people here will pay $50k for a Toyota if it runs but it's ridiculous. My AC has a high pitch whistle if I go any higher than level 2. I can't afford a $200+ diagnostic fee at the dealer. Plastic parts snap like it's an old 90s car. I barely drive this car. It has under 25,000 miles with several broken plastic pieces. I'm not hard on cars as I'm a car enthusiast. I bet money that my GMT 800 would last longer than this piece of shit.
